homePageMeta.title: Roel Nijhuis
homePageMeta.description: Personal website and resume for Roel Nijhuis, a calm and curious software engineer from the Netherlands.

hero.intro: I'm a Computing Science Graduate based in Nijmegen (the Netherlands), with a focus on building practical web applications. In September I will be starting a master's in Information Science.
hero.body: Calm and approachable by nature. I enjoy collaborating with others, learning new skills, and solving problems in a thoughtful way. Outside of work/studies I like playing music, hockey, running, and a good game of chess.

aboutDescription: Calm and approachable, with the ability to get along well with almost everyone, is how I would describe myself. I'm attentive to the needs of others and enjoy contributing to a positive work environment. I consider myself to be an eager learner and I regularly seek opportunities to build new skills, whether through collaboration or self-directed learning such as online content.

education.title: Bachelor Computing Science
education.content: Specialisation tracks in Data Science and Cyber Security. Minor in Physics and minor in Business.
education.content2: Built a strong scientific base before focusing fully on Computing Science.
education.content3: Completed part of my high school education abroad.
education.content4: Profile NT, with business economics as an additional course.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.content: Full-stack development for the web app daariseenzaaltjevoor.nl.
experience.content2: Tutoring for the course Algorithms & Data Structures.
experience.content3: Including but not limited to: Events Committee, Partner Committee, Lustrum Committee (Chair), and Audit Committee.
experience.content4: Responsible for the finances of a study association with approximately 800 members.
experience.content5: Household assistance for an individual with mobility challenges.
experience.content6: Tutored scientific subjects including Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics.
experience.content7: Worked in store operations with restocking and coordination tasks.
experience.content8: Designed simple website for an acquaintance.

contact.description: If you would like to collaborate, chat about software, or just say hello, feel free to reach out through email or LinkedIn.
